insights.insight: Ad tech charges $5–$150 CPA for modeled attribution. This protocol settles verified purchase confirmation at roughly $0.10 per receipt — the cost delta is structural, not incremental, because the receipt eliminates the attribution problem rather than solving it.

Chrome's deprecation of third-party cookies removes the last major cross-site tracking primitive shared by Safari and Firefox — device fingerprinting is increasingly blocked, first-party data is ecosystem-blind, and data brokers face compounding legal liability. No incumbent stack produces identity-free, cryptographically verified purchase signals across retailers.

Amazon, Walmart, and Kroger each see only their own transaction slice — none can see across the ecosystem without a data-sharing agreement that doesn't exist. At 3,893 verified receipts spanning physical retail, AI tools, and dev SaaS, this protocol is the only active cross-ecosystem purchase signal that carries no identity attachment.

17 active CBSAs with 9 non-metro state designations — FL, TN, KY, IL, TX, MI, WI, NY, MO — indicate word-of-mouth diffusion along social graphs, not paid acquisition in metro markets. For brands targeting non-metro physical retail consumers, this is a verified demand signal in a segment that traditional digital targeting consistently underserves.

Physical retail consumers (Walmart, Kroger, Dollar General), AI/SaaS users (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gamma), and dev infrastructure buyers (Vercel, Render, DigitalOcean) are submitting receipts through the same verification layer simultaneously. A brand marketer can observe purchase behavior across categories that no single data broker or platform currently connects.

The underlying technology — Ed25519 signatures and DKIM verification — is open standard and replicable. The moat is the accumulating dataset: at $227,031 in verified GMV, the query value of the token pool increases with every receipt added, creating a first-mover dynamic where late entrants pay more for access to infrastructure they didn't help build.
